# Formatted Document: team/profiles/smith.qmd
---
title: Jane Smith
image: ../../assets/images/placeholder.jpg
categories: [Current, Modeling, CPSC 444]
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com
---
Jane Smith researches spatial analytics and assists with agricultural modeling instruction.ß
